---
name: documentation-conventions
description: Enforce documentation conventions for project docs and traceability records.
applyTo: 'docs/**/*.md'
---

- Keep engineering-decisions.md entries dated and concise, with rationale, and keep each entry to 4-6 sentences.
- Keep ai-traceability.md entries in the existing Task ID | Prompt | Output | Verdict | Rationale table format.
- Ensure api-summary.md reflects verified live controller mappings rather than assumptions or stale Swagger captures.
